csp.quant_note: The $345 CSP May 22 leads all CSP candidates at 29.62% AROC with 24 DTE — shortest expiry maximizes Theta decay rate. At -0.25 delta the strike sits ~5.7% OTM from ~$366, offering a solid cushion. Outperforms the May 29 and Jun 5 equivalents by 150bps+ annualized despite collecting less raw premium.

cc.quant_note: The $395 CC May 22 tops the CC group at 29.92% AROC with 24 DTE — highest yield in the scan. Strike sits ~$29 OTM (~7.9% above ~$366), providing meaningful upside buffer. Short 24-day expiry drives superior Theta capture vs the May 29 alternatives.
